depends_on.name: element_id
depends_on.documentation: The document ID of the element this image stack is associated with.

file.name: imagestack_file
file.documentation: The file containing the image stack data.

fields.name: label
fields.documentation: Free-text label or caption describing the image stack (e.g., 'An image of fluorescently labeled bacterial patches that has been processed to ...').

fields.name: format_ontology
fields.documentation: Ontology CURIE describing the image format / content type (e.g., 'NCIT:C70631' for a particular imaging modality). v1 corpora ship the CURIE directly as a char; consumers resolve via ndi.ontology.lookup when a human-readable name is needed.
